description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat, dark-tiled roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by a mix of greenery including a row of tall shrubs and a landscaped garden area. A driveway leads to a two-car garage, and there is a visible entryway with steps and a small overhang. The backyard features a swimming pool with lounge chairs and a privacy fence, creating a private outdoor living space. Large windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, garage, landscaped garden, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: View 0 highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: View 1 shows the side of the house with the pool area, privacy fence, and a row of tall shrubs.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front facade, including the main entryway, garage, driveway, and front landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear and side of the house, focusing on the garage, driveway, and utility area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, steps, small overhang, and minimalistic landscaping
